summary: A GPU cloud vendor announcing they now sell newer GPUs. That's not news, that's inventory management with a blog post.
career_angle: If you're training or fine-tuning models, benchmark Modal's B200 pricing against Lambda, CoreWeave, and RunPod before committing. The real story is cost-per-FLOP, not the press release.

dimensions.rationale: Modal is a legit compute provider but this is their own marketing blog, not independent reporting
Simple factual claim about their own infrastructure -- hard to fabricate GPU availability
Anyone can sign up and check if the GPUs are actually there
Pure self-promotion -- company announcing its own product to drive signups and revenue
Excerpt is just 'available starting today' with zero pricing, benchmarks, or capacity details
B200/H200 rollouts are happening across every major cloud provider -- nothing novel here
Modal has delivered on previous GPU launches and has a solid reputation in ML infra
